query:
DELETE FROM teachers
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT t.id
  FROM (SELECT id, userId FROM teachers) t
  LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id AND u.roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
  WHERE u.id IS NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute DELETE FROM teachers
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT t.id
  FROM (SELECT id, userId FROM teachers) t
  LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id AND u.roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
  WHERE u.id IS NULL
);
